assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion (30-day max) for the BFCM period — blocks everything including patches
assertions.reason: Response uses `--add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_upgrades` for the BFCM period (Nov 15 - Dec 5) and explicitly states it blocks ALL upgrades including patches

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion for the June code freeze period
assertions.reason: Response uses `--add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_upgrades` for the June period and explicitly describes it as blocking ALL upgrades

assertions.expectation: For permanent minor version control: uses 'no minor upgrades' (scope 'no_minor') if they only want to block minor versions, or 'no minor or node upgrades' (scope 'no_minor_or_node') if they also want to stop node upgrades. May recommend persistent exclusion with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support which auto-tracks EoS date
assertions.reason: Response uses `--add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_minor_upgrades` and `--add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support` for persistent minor version control, which auto-tracks End of Support dates

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for 'no upgrades' exclusions vs up-to-EoS for 'no minor or node upgrades'
assertions.reason: Response mentions 30-day 'no upgrades' exclusion for June code freeze and explains the persistent exclusion automatically tracks End of Support dates

assertions.expectation: Provides specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for each exclusion type
assertions.reason: Response provides complete gcloud commands with proper `--add-maintenance-exclusion-scope` flags: `no_minor_upgrades` for persistent control and `no_upgrades` for June and BFCM periods

assertions.expectation: Notes that you can have a maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions, and they must allow 48h of maintenance in any 32-day window
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Maximum 3 "no_upgrades" exclusions per cluster' and 'Within any 32-day rolling window, at least 48 hours must be available for maintenance'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'These exclusions only block AUTO-upgrades' and 'You can still manually trigger upgrades anytime with gcloud container clusters upgrade'

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Response does not explicitly warn about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods, though it does mention End of Support dates
